description: Verify that high-risk or ambiguous Agent work opens a human judgment case and cannot continue, resume, or complete until a qualified human decision closes it.

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cp -a agent-system "$tmp/agent-system"; cp -a scripts "$tmp/scripts"; export DIGITAL_OFFICE_SYSTEM_HOME="$tmp/agent-system"; export HERMES_HOME="$tmp"; office="$tmp/agent-system/bin/office-system"; router="$tmp/scripts/agent-router"; task='Please have the legal team output a formal contract legal opinion and send it to the client.'; "$office" judgment-evaluate --task "$task" --stage decide --action final_delivery > "$tmp/eval.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["evaluation"]["decision"] == "pause"; assert "final_delivery" in data["evaluation"]["blocked_actions"]' "$tmp/eval.json"; "$router" --route-json "$task" > "$tmp/route.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["judgment"]["decision"] == "pause"' "$tmp/route.json"; "$office" workflow-start --tenant t1 --deployment d1 --user u1 --role project_manager --task "$task" --run-id jrun --task-id jtask > "$tmp/workflow.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["status"] == "waiting_human_judgment"; assert data["task_status"] == "waiting_human_judgment"; assert data["judgment_case"]["status"] == "pending"; print(data["judgment_case"]["case_id"])' "$tmp/workflow.json" > "$tmp/case_id"; case_id=$(cat "$tmp/case_id"); set +e; "$office" workflow-resume --run-id jrun --requested-by u1 --role project_manager > "$tmp/resume_blocked.json" 2>&1; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; set +e; "$office" task-update --task-id jtask --status completed --updated-by u1 --role project_manager > "$tmp/task_completion_blocked.json" 2>&1; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; set +e; "$office" loop-stage --run-id jrun --stage context --status started > "$tmp/stage_blocked.json" 2>&1; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; "$office" judgment-decision --case-id "$case_id" --decision approve --decided-by reviewer1 --role professional_reviewer --confirmed --message 'Reviewed legal-risk boundary; continue as draft only.' > "$tmp/decision.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); sig=data["resume_signal"]; assert data["judgment"]["status"] == "approved"; assert sig["control_decision"] == "continue"; assert sig["requires_dispatch"] is True; assert sig["command_args"][0]["command"] == "workflow-dispatch-next"' "$tmp/decision.json"; "$office" workflow-resume --run-id jrun --requested-by u1 --role project_manager > "$tmp/resumed.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); sig=data["resume_signal"]; assert data["status"] in {"created", "context_loading"}; assert sig["control_decision"] == "continue"; assert sig["requires_dispatch"] is True' "$tmp/resumed.json"; "$office" task-status --task-id jtask > "$tmp/task.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["status"] == "queued"' "$tmp/task.json"
